name: consumption trace: when --skip-fresh was used during generation, freshness_at_generation records operator-bypass
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --consulted x --bypassed --emit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json" && grep "operator-bypass" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
